design_identity.core_concept: The Future of Cleanliness. Where precision meets comfort.

headings.usage: Use 'Syne' for all H1-H6. It provides that unique, futuristic geometric feel.

rules.contrast: Ensure text is #0F172A on light backgrounds and #FFFFFF on dark backgrounds.
rules.forbidden: Do not use #1B93A4 (Teal) for dashboards. Use #06B6D4 (Cyan) instead.

grid_system.bento_grid: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 2rem;

primary.css: background: var(--gradient-primary); color: white; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 1rem 2rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Syne'; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;

secondary.css: background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--primary); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 1rem 2rem;

glass_panel.css: background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); border-radius: 16px; padding: 2rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);

feature_card.css: background: white; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; transition: border-color 0.3s;

inputs.style: background: white; border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Inter';

hero_bg.alt: Futuristic clean living room with round window
hero_bg.description: Use as full-screen hero background with dark overlay.

service_move_in.alt: Move in/out cleaning - Empty pristine room

accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring.
accessibility.aria_labels: Buttons with icons only must have aria-label.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are working with Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS. DO NOT attempt to import React components.
Use the CDN links provided for Fonts and Icons in the <head> of every HTML file.
Define the CSS Variables in 'assets/css/main.css' :root first.
Implement the 'Glassmorphism' effect for the Navbar and Service Cards.
Use the 'Syne' font for all headings to establish the brand identity.
The Dashboard should use the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype: Stark white backgrounds with bold black text and Cyan accents.
Ensure all images use the 'object-fit: cover' property to maintain aspect ratio.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and inputs (e.g., 'login-btn', 'email-input').
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'SaaS blue' (#3B82F6) as the primary brand color; stick to the defined Deep Space Blue and Cyan accent.
Ensure 80vh max height for hero images on mobile.
Use 'sonner' style toast notifications (implemented via custom JS/CSS since no React).
